header.title: JalSoochak
header.subtitle: National Rural Drinking Water Supply Dashboard

searchLayout.placeholder: Search by state/UT, district, block, gram panchayat, village

map.loadError: Unable to load the map right now.

schemesSupplyingWater.description: Count of schemes that supplied water for the selected date range consistently.

criticalSchemes.description: Schemes identified as failing to supply water for the last {{days}} days.

definitions.waterQuantitySupplied: water quantity supplied on kth day
definitions.totalWaterSupplied: total water supplied across all days
definitions.totalNumberOfDays: total number of days in the selected time-period

definitions.waterQuantitySupplied: water quantity supplied on kth day
definitions.functionalHouseholdTapConnections: functional household tap connections of scheme i
definitions.numberOfDays: total number of days in the selected time-period

definitions.numberOfSupplyDays: Number of continuous supply-days of scheme
definitions.totalNumberOfDaysInSelectedPeriod: total number of days in the selected time period

quantity.title: Quantity Performance
quantity.ariaViewByGramPanchayat: Gram panchayat quantity performance view by

regularity.title: Regularity Performance
regularity.ariaViewByGramPanchayat: Gram panchayat regularity performance view by

outageAndSubmissionCharts.ariaViewByBlock: Block supply outage distribution view by
outageAndSubmissionCharts.ariaViewByGramPanchayat: Gram panchayat supply outage distribution view by

supplyOutageReasons.tooltip: Counts are based on unique schemes. A scheme may appear in multiple regions, so region totals may be higher.

pumpOperators.title: Schemes
pumpOperators.note: Note: Schemes active for at least 30 days in a month.

regularityPerformance.title: Regularity Performance
regularityPerformance.description: Percentage of days within the selected period that schemes supplied water consistently.

definitions.xi: number of continuous supply-days of scheme i
definitions.n: total number of days in the selected period

quantityPerformance.title: Quantity Performance
quantityPerformance.description: Average volume of water supplied per person per day, measured in Litres per Capita per Day (LPCD), across functional household tap connections.
quantityPerformance.formulaLabel: Quantity (LPCD: Litres per Capita per Day)

definitions.wk: water quantity supplied on day k (in litres)
definitions.fhtci: functional household tap connections of scheme i
definitions.n: total number of days in the selected period
definitions.demandLine: the demand line shows the required LPCD threshold ({{lpcd}} L) based on household tap connections

readingSubmissionRate.title: Reading Submission Rate
readingSubmissionRate.description: Percentage of days that pump operators submitted water flow meter readings for their schemes in the selected period.

definitions.si: number of days pump operator submitted a reading for scheme i
definitions.n: total number of days in the selected period

readingSubmissionStatus.title: Reading Submission Status
readingSubmissionStatus.description: Breakdown of submitted readings by compliance status across all schemes in the selected period.
readingSubmissionStatus.compliantDescription: Readings submitted within acceptable thresholds that meet data quality criteria.
readingSubmissionStatus.anomalousDescription: Readings flagged as potentially inaccurate based on automated quality checks (e.g. sudden spikes or repeated identical values).

supplyOutageReasons.title: Supply Outage Reasons
supplyOutageReasons.description: Distribution of reported supply interruption events by root cause. Counts are based on unique schemes — a scheme may appear in multiple regions, so regional totals may exceed the overall figure.

definitions.electricalFailure: Power supply interruption to the pump station
definitions.pipelineBreak: Leakage or rupture in the water distribution pipeline
definitions.pumpFailure: Mechanical breakdown of the pump equipment
definitions.sourceDrying: Insufficient water at the source (borewell, surface water, etc.)

supplyOutageDistribution.title: Supply Outage Distribution
supplyOutageDistribution.description: Geographic spread of supply outage events across child regions within the selected area and period. Regions with more frequent outages are shown with higher values on the chart.

activeSchemes.title: Active Schemes
activeSchemes.description: Count of schemes by operational status based on water supply reporting in the selected period.
activeSchemes.activeDescription: Schemes that reported at least one water supply reading in the selected period.
activeSchemes.nonActiveDescription: Schemes that did not report any water supply readings in the selected period.

schemePerformance.title: Scheme Performance
schemePerformance.description: Ranked list of schemes within the selected region, showing reporting compliance and total water supplied.

definitions.reportingRate: Percentage of days the pump operator submitted a reading (submission days ÷ total days × 100)
definitions.waterSupplied: Total volume of water supplied by the scheme in the selected period (in litres)

readingCompliance.title: Reading Compliance
readingCompliance.description: Daily log of water supply meter readings submitted for the selected scheme. Shows the date and reported reading value.

pumpOperatorDetails.title: Pump Operator Details
pumpOperatorDetails.description: Summary of a pump operator's activity for the selected scheme within the chosen period — including their reporting frequency and when they last submitted a reading.

pumpOperatorReportingRate.description: Percentage of days in the selected period for which this pump operator submitted a reading for this scheme. Computed as: submission days ÷ total days × 100.

pumpOperatorLastSubmission.description: Date and time of the most recent meter reading submitted by this pump operator for this scheme.

pumpOperatorMissingSubmissions.description: Number of days in the selected period for which this pump operator did not submit any reading for this scheme.

glossaryPage.title: Dashboard Glossary
glossaryPage.subtitle: Definitions and formulas for all metrics, charts, and indicators used in this dashboard.
